docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,447.00 FILED BY RICHARD LAURENCE : AN ACCOUNTANCY CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT FARAEL, MONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

TRIAL RESET TO JAN-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07 TRIAL OF JAN-07-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FARAEL, MONY
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO MONY FARAEL, NOT SERVED 25 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHARD LAURENCE : AN ACCOUNTANCY CORP. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FARAEL, MONY PLTF FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF THAT DEFT AS IND. INSTEAD OF THE CORP IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
